test.name: Verify confidence calibration on the death-certificate person link
test.description: Review pe_005, the person_evidence link from a_013 (death certificate naming Thomas Flynn as Patrick's father) to person I1 (Patrick Flynn). The link is `confident` — the death certificate names Patrick Flynn, Schuylkill County, 1908, matching the subject's known identity. The skill should confirm the confidence calibration is appropriate.

input.user_message: Review the identity link between the death certificate and Patrick Flynn.

judge_context: Should confirm `confidence: "confident"` is appropriate — the death certificate directly names 'Patrick Flynn' of Schuylkill County 1908, matching the subject's known place and time of death with no plausible alternative candidates
Should evaluate whether the existing `rationale` cites multiple matching attributes (name, place, date) and addresses why competing candidates were ruled out — not just 'names match'
